mapper.sql: id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
